title: 151 Products Limited 10 Metres Double Sided Tape - Strong and Reliable (Packaging may vary)
features: INSTANT BONDING: 151 Adhesives Double Sided Tape, high tack for long term bonding for home, craft, DIY, securing display signage projects.
MULTI USE TAPE: 151 Adhesives Double Sided Tape, perfect to secure point of sale signs, use for crafting, securing card, fabrics & other decorative trims.
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use double sided tape. Size: 10m x 48mm x 0.15mm. Store at room temperature
